- Claude couldn't find 'em-skill' when asked from other repos
- First attempt using ~/.claude/config.json failed

- Claude Code CLI reads from ~/.claude/skills/ directory
- Each skill needs its own directory with SKILL.md file
- config.json is NOT used for skill discovery

Solution:
- Created ~/.claude/skills/em-skill/SKILL.md
- Complete skill manifest with YAML frontmatter
- Symlinks for individual skills
